orchestrator.description: Strategic platform planner: reads backlog and plan, decomposes work, delegates to infra/pipeline builders. Entry point for every session.

builder-infra-tf.description: Implements Azure Terraform infrastructure as code (IaC) modules and configurations.

builder-infra-bicep.description: Implements Azure Bicep infrastructure as code (IaC) templates and parameter files.

builder-pipelines.description: Implements secure CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions and Azure DevOps Pipelines) with OIDC federation.

verifier.description: Runs linter, compilation validations (terraform validate / bicep build), and plan generation dry-runs.

security-auditor.description: Read-only security review. Audits IaC files and pipelines for resource configurations, exposed secrets, and weak IAM.

plan-validator.description: Compares execution plans (terraform plan / what-if) against state safety rules. Safely prevents accidental resource deletion.

code-reviewer.description: Reviews implemented IaC files for maintainability, tagging rules, structure, and naming conventions.

explorer.description: Fast read-only codebase navigator to trace modules, resource references, and folder structures.

test-writer.description: Writes sprint-appropriate infrastructure assertions and unit tests (e.g., .tftest.hcl or Bicep test files).

docs-writer.description: Updates module READMEs, variables parameters documentation, architecture records (ADRs), and runbooks.

select-models.description: Select and configure optimized models for each agent based on jurisdiction, cost/quality focus, and local hardware capabilities.
select-models.template: Please use the `model-optimiser` skill. Gather the user's preferences (jurisdiction, local models, focus, hardware), then run `python3 scripts/select-models.py discover` to fetch the live ZEN and Ollama catalogs. Read each agent's prompt and skills to reason out the optimal available model per agent, present a proposal, and on acceptance write a mapping file and run `python3 scripts/select-models.py apply` to implement and verify.

scaffold.description: Scaffold a new, secure and compliant platform-engineering repository
scaffold.template: Please use the `scaffold` skill to execute the scaffold workflow. Coordinate between the orchestrator (to gather options), the builders (to deploy templates), and the auditors (to verify safety rules).

audit.description: Scan the current workspace for compliance, credentials, and network vulnerability risks.
audit.template: Please use the `audit` skill to audit the current workspace configurations, modules, and pipelines. Scan using glob/grep for raw secrets, credentials, and network vulnerability patterns. Summon the security auditor to compose a detailed compliance report.

debug.description: Analyze and debug failing pipeline runs, compilation issues, or deployment errors.
debug.template: Please use the `debug` skill to diagnose compilation, pipeline, or deployment failures. Analyze logs, trace files, and coordinate fixes with the builder agents.

expand.description: Onboard a new application workload or expand the landing zone infrastructure under strict governance.
expand.template: Please use the `expand` skill to design and deploy new cloud resources, spoke subnets, or workload applications under strict security governance rules.

optimise.description: Scan the current workspace for cost-saving opportunities and resource sizing inefficiencies.
optimise.template: Please use the `optimise` skill to scan the current workspace configurations, modules, and templates for cost leaks, oversized SKUs, and resource sizing inefficiencies. Coordinate with the code-reviewer and security-auditor to ensure optimizations do not compromise security or standards, and summon the docs-writer to compile a detailed cost optimization report.

drift.description: Detect, classify, and reconcile infrastructure drift against the desired IaC state.
drift.template: Please use the `drift` skill to coordinate the automated drift detection workflow. Direct `@verifier` to run the necessary Terraform plan and/or Bicep what-if commands with JSON outputs, provide those artifacts to `@plan-validator` so they can classify each drift and enforce blast-radius safety rules, summon `@security-auditor` to flag any security regressions introduced by manual drift, and instruct `@docs-writer` to compile `DRIFT_REPORT.md` from `templates/docs/reports/drift-reconciliation-template.md` with remediation guidance.

compliance.description: Map IaC, pipelines, and audit artifacts to regulatory controls and generate a compliance readiness report.
compliance.template: Please use the `compliance` skill to orchestrate the `/compliance` workflow. Direct `@security-auditor` to ingest the latest `security-checklist` and `/audit` artifacts, validate OIDC evidence, and produce control status findings; request `@code-reviewer` to confirm CAF tagging, naming, and WAF alignment for the scoped modules; and instruct `@docs-writer` to compile `COMPLIANCE_READINESS_REPORT.md` from `templates/docs/reports/compliance-readiness-template.md`, cross-referencing `DRIFT_REPORT.md` and other supporting evidence.
